pages.title: Hopper Rules
pages.text: $(li)Insert machine resources from the sides.$(br)$(li)Extract incubator output from below.$(br)$(li)Keep output space available before feeding inputs.$(br)$(li)Keep the incubator seed slot manual.$(br)$(li)Condenser extraction does not reset its active cycle.

pages.title: Optional Mods
pages.text: $(li)$(bold)JEI$(): recipe lookup and machine categories.$(br)$(li)$(bold)Curios$(): wearable support equipment.$(br)$(li)$(bold)KubeJS$(): recipe and event extensions.$(br)$(li)$(bold)Patchouli$(): this research manual.$(br2)All four integrations are optional. Core gameplay remains available without them.
